name: Cornerstone Bank
description_short: Cornerstone Bank Lexington, VA — Cornerstone Bank is a community-focused Virginia bank offering personal and business banking services with local branch...
description_long:
Cornerstone Bank operates as a traditional community bank serving Virginia with a strong emphasis on local relationships and community investment. The bank positions itself as a trusted local institution committed to supporting both personal customers and local businesses through dedicated service and community engagement. Their website reflects a commitment to accessibility and customer support, with resources dedicated to banking education and account management.

The bank offers core banking services including personal and business checking and savings accounts, online banking platforms for both personal and commercial customers, debit and credit card services, loan products (with online and in-person application options), and fund transfer capabilities. They maintain physical branch locations with extended hours and provide 24/7 ATM access across their service area. The institution supports account opening, online account access, transaction management, and loan applications.

Cornerstone Bank distinguishes itself through its community-first approach, explicitly stating commitment to local investment and business development in the areas it serves. The bank emphasizes relationship-building and positions its team as accessible and responsive to customer needs. Their operating structure includes Saturday appointment banking, extended Friday hours (until 6:15 PM drive-thru), and multiple ATM locations for customer convenience. The website highlights talent development and hiring local staff as part of their community integration strategy.

As a traditional community bank, Cornerstone Bank is best suited for customers seeking personalized local banking relationships rather than digital-first or national banking solutions. Their service offerings are standard for regional banks, with no specialized products like investment management, wealth advisory, or advanced digital banking features mentioned on their public-facing website. The bank appears to target both retail customers and small to medium-sized businesses in their Virginia operating region. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal online banking platform with login access
Debit card services with 24/7 lost/stolen reporting
Account opening and new customer enrollment
pros: 24/7 ATM access available across service area
Extended Friday hours (drive-thru open until 6:15 PM)
Saturday appointment banking available for convenience
Local community investment and business support commitment
Both personal and business online banking platforms offered
Multiple contact channels: in-person branches, phone (540.463.2222), and online
Accessible website design with AudioEye accessibility toolbar
cons: Limited to Virginia service area; not a national bank
No mention of competitive interest rates or fee structures on website
No specialized products like investment accounts, wealth management, or premium banking tiers mentioned
Limited digital banking innovation compared to neobanks or major national institutions
Saturday hours only by appointment, not full-service
best_for: Virginia residents seeking personalized local banking relationships
Small to medium-sized businesses requiring community-focused business banking
Customers prioritizing accessibility and branch-based customer service
Community-minded depositors wanting to support local business growth
diagnosis: Cornerstone Bank is best for Virginia residents and small business owners seeking relationship-based banking with local community involvement and accessible branch service. The main caveat is that as a regional community bank, they lack the product diversity, digital innovation, and national reach of larger institutions, making them less suitable for customers needing specialized financial services or nationwide banking convenience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
